## 1. Build, Lint, Test and Coverage

| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| `bash hooks/install.sh` | Install 3 hooks + commands + skill + agent into `~/.claude` |
| `bash hooks/install.sh --force` | Reinstall, overwrite existing files |
| `bash hooks/uninstall.sh` | Remove hooks from `~/.claude/settings.json` |
| `node hooks/caveman-docs-activate.js` | Manual run: emit SKILL.md body (SessionStart payload) |
| `node hooks/caveman-docs-tracker.js` | Manual run: feed JSON prompt on stdin to test intent detection |
| `node hooks/caveman-docs-pre-write.js` | Manual run: feed JSON tool-call on stdin to test AI doc path match |

No test runner. Validation via `test -f`, `grep`, `wc`.

## 2. Code Style & Project Conventions

See [`docs/agents/coding_guidelines.md`](docs/agents/coding_guidelines.md).

Key rules (enforced by hook self-tests + caveman-docs compression on write):
- AI docs compressed per `skills/caveman-docs/SKILL.md` rules (enforced by 3 hooks wired in `hooks/install.sh`)
- Node hooks: CommonJS only (`hooks/package.json` sets `"type": "commonjs"`)
- Hooks must exit 0 on any error — never block a tool call (silent-fail blocks in `hooks/caveman-docs-pre-write.js:92`, `hooks/caveman-docs-tracker.js:112`)
- `settings.json` mutations atomic with backup at `$SETTINGS.caveman-docs.bak` (`hooks/install.sh:115`)
- Path matching normalizes `\` → `/` before regex test (`hooks/caveman-docs-pre-write.js:35`)

## 3. Agent Communication & Behavioral Guidelines

- Propose diffs, not explanations
- Never paraphrase commands — verbatim code blocks only
- Match existing file header comment style when adding hook scripts

### Never in this repository

- Never write `Co-Authored-By: Claude` or AI-agent sign-offs in commits (project policy)
- Never modify `~/.claude/settings.json` outside `hooks/install.sh` / `hooks/uninstall.sh` (atomic mutation contract)
- Never compress `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md` (exempt per `hooks/caveman-docs-pre-write.js:27`)
- Never block Write/Edit tool calls — hooks silent-fail (`hooks/caveman-docs-pre-write.js:93`)
- Never commit without user request

## 4. Setup, Troubleshooting and Tips

**Prereqs:** `node` (required by `hooks/install.sh:17`), bash, Claude Code CLI, macOS/Linux.

**Install:**
```sh
bash hooks/install.sh
```

Restart Claude Code after install — hooks register at SessionStart.

**Troubleshooting:**
| Symptom | Check |
|---------|-------|
| Hooks not firing | `grep caveman-docs ~/.claude/settings.json` — expect 3 entries |
| Install reports "already installed" | Re-run `bash hooks/install.sh --force` |
| Flag missing (`~/.claude/.caveman-docs-active`) | Confirm `caveman-docs-activate.js:14` ran at SessionStart |
| Compression not applied to AI doc | Confirm path matches patterns in `hooks/caveman-docs-pre-write.js:14-24` |
| `node` not found during install | Install Node.js; required at `hooks/install.sh:17` |
| Settings corrupted | Restore from `~/.claude/settings.json.caveman-docs.bak` |
